inputs.text: Main thoda bahut bukhar mehsoos kar rahi hoon, sar dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache and fatigue can also be seen in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, the symptoms are not specific enough to suspect typhoid at this stage

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi hai aur kabz ki shikayat hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and abdominal pain are suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain, the fever pattern is atypical

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: The fever pattern and abdominal pain are not typical of viral fever

inputs.text: Ab toh tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai aur bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, abdominal pain, and diarrhea after constipation is highly suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, the fever pattern and abdominal pain are more suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria typically presents with cyclical fever and chills, which are not seen in this case

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gayi hoon, bukhar abhi bhi hai aur pet dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The patient's symptoms and signs are consistent with typhoid, and the risk of intestinal perforation is high

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of high fever and abdominal pain

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of cyclical fever and chills
